steps.title: Locate the intercept type
steps.content: The $x$-intercept is where the graph crosses the $x$-axis. At that point, the $y$-coordinate is $0$.

steps.title: Read the graph point
steps.content: From the graph, the line crosses the $x$-axis at $x=-12$. Therefore, the intercept is +$$(-12,0)$$ +The answer is A.
